---
title: "Robert Kimutai"
subtitle: "Researcher • Data Scientist • Systems Developer"
author: ""
date: today
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: article
    css: [resume-styles.css]
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
          <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    include-after-body:
      - file: resume-scripts.js
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    papersize: a4
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - left=20mm
      - right=20mm
    fontsize: 10pt
    colorlinks: true
    linkcolor: blue
    urlcolor: blue
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{fontawesome5}
          \usepackage{xcolor}
          \usepackage{sectsty}
          \usepackage{titlesec}
          \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \usepackage{lastpage}
          \definecolor{primarycolor}{RGB}{102,126,234}
          \definecolor{secondarycolor}{RGB}{118,75,162}
          \definecolor{textgray}{RGB}{113,128,150}
          \sectionfont{\color{primarycolor}}
          \subsectionfont{\color{primarycolor}}
          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhf{}
          \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
          \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{12pt}{6pt}
          \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{10pt}{4pt}
---

::: {.header-section}
# Robert Kimutai {.no-toc}

**Transforming Complex Challenges into Data-Driven Solutions**

::: {.contact-row}
<i class="fas fa-envelope"></i> robert.kimutai.ds@gmail.com | 
<i class="fas fa-phone"></i> +254 723 493 122 | 
<i class="fas fa-map-marker-alt"></i> Nairobi, Kenya

<i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i> [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-kimutai-921608330/) | 
<i class="fab fa-github"></i> [GitHub](https://github.com/RobertKimutai-DS) | 
<i class="fas fa-globe"></i> [Portfolio](#)
:::
:::

::: {.summary-section}
## Professional Summary

Innovative researcher and full-stack data scientist with 3+ years of experience bridging environmental engineering, data science, and systems development. Expert in developing IoT-enabled solutions, machine learning models with 90%+ accuracy, and scalable web applications. Currently leading three high-impact projects: a solar cooker evaluation platform (ASAE S580.1 compliant), tax reform impact analysis for Kenya, and county revenue digitization system for Kericho County.
:::

## Core Competencies

::: {.skills-container}
**Data Science & ML:** R • Python • Tidymodels • XGBoost • Time Series • SHAP/DALEX • Statistical Modeling • Predictive Analytics

**Development:** Shiny • Quarto • REST APIs • Docker • Git/GitHub • Cloud Deployment • Database Design (SQL/PostgreSQL)

**Engineering:** Arduino/C++ • IoT Systems • Sensor Integration • Proteus Simulation • Solar PV Design • QGIS • AutoCAD

**Research:** Experimental Design • Impact Assessment • Technical Writing • Data Visualization • Reproducible Research
:::

## Current Projects

::: {.project-item}
**Solar Cooker Performance Evaluation Platform** | *Lead Developer* | 2021-Present  
- Developed IoT system with Arduino sensors (DS18B20, BPW34) for real-time performance monitoring  
- Built Shiny web application integrating environmental, health, and socioeconomic impact calculators  
- Implemented ASAE S580.1 testing standards achieving 95% measurement accuracy  
- Technologies: Arduino, R/Shiny, Proteus, SQLite, Plotly, Real-time APIs
:::

::: {.project-item}
**Tax Reform Impact Analysis on Income Distribution** | *Research Data Scientist* | KESRA | 2021  
- Analyzed 15+ years of tax policy data using advanced statistical methods  
- Developed ML models to predict income distribution changes with 87% accuracy  
- Created interactive dashboards for policy makers using Shiny and Plotly  
- Technologies: R, Tidymodels, ggplot2, Quarto, SQL, Time Series Analysis
:::

::: {.project-item}
**County Revenue Collection Digital Platform** | *Systems Architect* | Kericho County | 2024-Present  
- Designing end-to-end revenue management system starting with single business permits  
- Implementing real-time analytics reducing revenue leakages by projected 30%  
- Building scalable microservices architecture supporting 10,000+ transactions daily  
- Technologies: R/Shiny, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Docker, AWS/Cloud
:::

## Professional Experience

::: {.experience-item}
**Graduate Research Assistant** | University of Nairobi | 2021-Present  
- Design and implement sensor-integrated renewable energy testing platforms  
- Develop reproducible research workflows using Quarto and GitHub Actions  
- Create interactive dashboards for real-time performance monitoring  
- Publish findings in peer-reviewed journals (3 papers, 2 under review)
:::

::: {.experience-item}
**Data Science Virtual Intern** | Boston Consulting Group (BCG) | 2024  
- Built customer churn prediction model achieving 90%+ AUC using ensemble methods  
- Analyzed 100K+ customer records identifying key churn drivers  
- Created interpretable ML visualizations using SHAP values  
- Delivered C-suite presentation with actionable retention strategies
:::

::: {.experience-item}
**Clerk of Works - Water & Solar Infrastructure** | SIVAP Kenya | 2022-2023  
- Supervised construction of 5 earth dams and 12 solarized boreholes  
- Managed solar pumping installations totaling 150kW capacity  
- Coordinated with stakeholders impacting 2,000+ farmers  
- Ensured 100% compliance with technical specifications
:::

::: {.experience-item}
**Sales Engineer** | Kupata Technologies Ltd | 2019-2022  
- Designed solar water pumping and irrigation systems for 50+ clients  
- Conducted technical assessments and feasibility studies  
- Increased sales revenue by 35% through data-driven proposals  
- Trained 100+ farmers on system operation and maintenance
:::

## Education

::: {.education-item}
**MSc Environmental and Biosystems Engineering** | University of Nairobi | 2021-Present  
*Thesis:* Development of Low-Cost Solar Cooker Performance Evaluation System with Impact Analysis  
*Relevant Coursework:* Renewable Energy Systems, Environmental Monitoring, Scientific Computing, Statistical Analysis
:::

::: {.education-item}
**BSc Agricultural Engineering** | JKUAT | 2013-2018  
*Thesis:* Automated Irrigation Scheduling System for Smallholder Farmers  
*Achievement:* Developed Arduino-based controller achieving 40% water savings
:::

## Achievements & Impact

::: {.achievements-container}
- **90%+ Model Accuracy:** BCG churn prediction model implementation  
- **40% Water Savings:** Smart irrigation system deployment  
- **2,000+ Farmers:** Impacted through water infrastructure projects  
- **150kW Solar Capacity:** Supervised installation across 3 counties  
- **15 Years Data Analysis:** Tax reform research insights  
- **3 Active Platforms:** Solar cooker, dairy management, revenue systems
:::

## Certifications & Professional Development

- **Advanced Diploma in Data Science with R** - Alison (2024)  
- **Machine Learning with R Studio** - Alison (2023)  
- **Statistical Data Analysis Using R** - RUFORUM (2022)  
- **Registered Graduate Engineer** - Engineers Board of Kenya (EBK)  
- **Graduate Member** - Institution of Engineers of Kenya (IEK)

## Additional Projects

::: {.additional-projects}
**Zero-Grazing Dairy Management Platform** | 2021-Present  
Full-stack Shiny application with modules for herd management, milk production tracking, inventory control, and labor management. Integrated SQLite database with role-based access control.

**Energy Sector Churn Analysis** | BCG Virtual Internship | 2024  
Developed comprehensive customer retention strategy using machine learning, achieving 90%+ prediction accuracy and identifying $2M+ revenue protection opportunity.
:::

## Leadership & Community

- **Tech Lead:** R Users Group Kenya - Monthly workshops on data science applications  
- **Mentor:** University coding bootcamp - Training 20+ students annually  
- **Volunteer:** Church youth programs - Leadership development and STEM education  
- **Athletics:** Swimming, Taekwondo (discipline & wellness), Chess (strategic thinking)

---

::: {.footer-note}
*References available upon request* | *Updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %Y")`*
:::
